SUMIT DESHMUKH

DevOps / Cloud Engineer

MCA postgraduate with hands-on exposure to DevOps and cloud fundamentals. Skilled in Linux administration, CI/CD, Docker, and AWS services including EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, and ALB. Building reliable, scalable infrastructure from Pune, India.

// 03

Projects

01
Deploy Scalable Web Application
AWS · EC2 · ELB · NGINX · React · Django

Designed and deployed a highly available web application on AWS using EC2 within a custom VPC. Developed with React and Django, integrated NGINX as a web server. Monitored performance using AWS CloudWatch.

02
Static Website Hosting on AWS S3
S3 · CloudFront · IAM

Hosted a static website on AWS S3 with public access control and configured bucket policies. Implemented secure content delivery using CloudFront and managed access through IAM roles and policies.
